title: Site Survey and Analysis
content:
A thorough site survey is the critical foundation of any successful landscape design project.

We conduct a detailed site analysis that includes:

- Precise dimensional measurements
- Comprehensive soil composition assessment
- Detailed sunlight and microclimate evaluation
- Comprehensive inventory of existing landscape features

For complex or extensive sites, we employ advanced technologies:

- High-precision photogrammetry
- Laser scanning detection
- Three-dimensional point cloud terrain modeling

These advanced techniques allow us to:

- Create a precise digital representation of the landscape
- Provide clients with an immersive virtual project visualisation
- Ensure accurate and detailed project planning

**Aims and Purposes:**

- Develop comprehensive site understanding
- Identify potential challenges and opportunities
- Create a detailed baseline for design interventions

**Drawings and Documents Provided:**

- Detailed three-dimensional terrain model
- Compatible CAD format for architectural software integration
- Comprehensive site analysis report

gallery.alt: First stage - 3D model superimposed on point cloud terrain
gallery.caption: First stage
gallery.description: In this phase, the three-dimensional model of the pool can be superimposed on the point cloud terrain model.

gallery.alt: Second stage - Stylized sketch of the intervention
gallery.caption: Second stage
gallery.description: In this second stage, a stylized sketch of the intervention can provide the client with an idea of how the finished product will appear.

gallery.caption: Third stage
gallery.description: In this final phase, control over the materials to be used can be further refined through photorealistic rendering.
